exception.message: Could not start a new session. Response code 500. Message: session not created: This version of ChromeDriver only supports Chrome version 135 Current browser version is 137.0.7151.105 with binary path C:\Program Files\Google\Chrome\Application\chrome.exe Host info: host: 'DESKTOP-J8UM1B9', ip: '192.168.68.247' Build info: version: '4.33.0', revision: '2c6aaad03a' System info: os.name: 'Windows 11', os.arch: 'amd64', os.version: '10.0', java.version: '23.0.1' Driver info: org.openqa.selenium.chrome.ChromeDriver Command: [null, newSession {capabilities=[Capabilities {browserName: chrome, goog:chromeOptions: {args: [], extensions: []}}]}]
